objective: Get Anika to court before dawn.
opposition: Anika cannot sleep and resists leaving bed.
turn: She follows Ravi anyway after hearing him in Maya's old kitchen spot.
consequence_cost: First surrender of morning autonomy.

objective: Complete full ghosting set.
opposition: Ravi keeps increasing reps while Anika's chest tightens with grief memory.
turn: Anika vomits, rinses, and resumes drills.
consequence_cost: Pain becomes her chosen mute button for mourning.

objective: Re-enter normal day after training.
opposition: School timetable and body fatigue collide.
turn: Anika texts Ravi that she can do this every day.
consequence_cost: Commits to a schedule that will erode peer life.

objective: Avoid attention in class.
opposition: Exhaustion causes mistakes and microsleeps.
turn: Teacher flags concern and emails home.
consequence_cost: Adult scrutiny enters school space.

objective: Decide between friendship and training slot.
opposition: Zoe offers a simple hangout while Ravi demands immediate court arrival.
turn: Anika refuses Zoe and leaves mid-conversation.
consequence_cost: Trust with Zoe drops; isolation increases.

objective: Sort Maya's kitchen belongings for donation.
opposition: Each object triggers Anika's sensory grief.
turn: Ravi labels boxes by speed, not meaning.
consequence_cost: Anika feels erased inside practical work.

objective: Finish closet purge before pickup deadline.
opposition: Ravi pushes tempo; Anika stalls on Maya's clothes.
turn: Argument spikes when Ravi calls memory-hoarding unhealthy.
consequence_cost: Father-daughter communication hardens into command and defiance.

objective: Keep one private connection to Maya.
opposition: Ravi watches every box and bag.
turn: Anika pockets Maya's watch while carrying linens.
consequence_cost: She begins a secret life of hidden artifacts.

objective: Regain control before sleep.
opposition: Grief surges in the silent apartment.
turn: Anika starts a private notebook logging reps, food, pain, and memories.
consequence_cost: Self-surveillance becomes coping architecture.

objective: Settle nerves before borough ladder match.
opposition: Older opponent taunts Anika's age and inexperience.
turn: Anika adopts hyper-controlled pre-serve routines.
consequence_cost: She narrows emotion into process.

objective: Close the match and validate training plan.
opposition: Crowd noise triggers hospital associations mid-rally.
turn: Anika wins, then collapses and vomits courtside.
consequence_cost: Ravi rewards outcome over wellbeing; pain-performance link deepens.

objective: Increase training load for city qualifier.
opposition: Recurring shin pain disrupts movement patterns.
turn: Anika hides the limp when Ravi looks over.
consequence_cost: Injury worsens under concealment.

objective: Handle school nurse intervention.
opposition: Nurse requests imaging and rest note.
turn: Anika downplays pain to avoid restrictions.
consequence_cost: Medical truth is deferred, risk compounds.

objective: Preserve qualifying readiness at any cost.
opposition: Jonah declines extra drills and Ravi pressures from sideline.
turn: Anika runs unauthorized late-session suicides alone.
consequence_cost: She chooses short-term readiness over bodily safety.

objective: Submit hardship fee paperwork on deadline.
opposition: Forms require debt disclosure and supporting statements.
turn: Anika sees the oncology balance and late notices.
consequence_cost: Winning becomes tied to imagined financial rescue.

objective: Process what she learned without confrontation.
opposition: Ravi minimizes debt severity and shuts down questions.
turn: Anika silently adds extra sessions to her notebook plan.
consequence_cost: Pressure internalizes; she self-coerces harder.

objective: Attend Zoe's birthday and stay present.
opposition: Anika tracks calories and missed practice minutes.
turn: A silly party game cracks her guarded posture.
consequence_cost: Temporary return of ordinary childhood affect.

objective: Repair friendship on honest terms.
opposition: Zoe challenges Anika's disappear-and-return pattern.
turn: Anika admits she listens for Maya's key every night.
consequence_cost: Emotional truth restores relational foothold.

objective: Go home without relapse into silence.
opposition: Ravi interrogates how late she stayed.
turn: Anika answers briefly but does not retract the evening.
consequence_cost: She claims a small zone of non-squash life.

objective: Qualify at city tournament.
opposition: Sharp shin pain and bracket pressure escalate each round.
turn: Anika plays through and secures qualification.
consequence_cost: Immediate success purchased with structural injury risk.

objective: Stabilize after collapse.
opposition: Ravi pushes to reinterpret pain as cramp.
turn: Imaging confirms stress fracture and six-week no-impact order.
consequence_cost: External authority halts the regimen and humiliates Ravi.

objective: Survive first week off-court.
opposition: No physical outlet amplifies grief intrusions.
turn: Anika starts pacing nightly routes inside the apartment.
consequence_cost: Rest becomes another performance trap.

objective: Re-establish contact with Ravi.
opposition: Ravi extends overtime and avoids conversation at dinner.
turn: Attempted small talk fails into silence.
consequence_cost: Household intimacy deteriorates.

objective: Find a nightly ritual that contains panic.
opposition: Silence after lights-out feels unmanageable.
turn: Anika replays Maya's voicemail until she can mouth every line.
consequence_cost: Memory ritual soothes and traps her simultaneously.

objective: Begin compliant physical therapy.
opposition: Tess sets strict load limits; Ravi challenges her authority.
turn: Functional testing exposes weakness and fear.
consequence_cost: Anika loses invincibility narrative in front of both adults.

objective: Retain eligibility under program rules.
opposition: Ravi seeks exceptions through administrators.
turn: Official warning states any protocol breach triggers suspension.
consequence_cost: Power shifts from household command to institutional constraints.

objective: Empty hospital locker before storage fee renewal.
opposition: Administrative rush discourages emotional pause.
turn: Anika finds sealed envelope bundle labeled for future birthdays.
consequence_cost: Past opens as active pressure in the present.

objective: Decide who controls Maya's letters.
opposition: Ravi insists on reading first and limiting access.
turn: Anika keeps one letter and refuses to hand it over.
consequence_cost: Authority is openly contested, not implied.

objective: Interpret Maya's message privately.
opposition: Letter rejects achievement as substitute for living.
turn: Anika recognizes she has been training to avoid feeling.
consequence_cost: She commits to testing boundaries at home.

objective: Negotiate terms for return to court.
opposition: Ravi accepts limits in principle but inserts loopholes.
turn: Anika lists non-negotiables in writing.
consequence_cost: She moves from pleading to contract language.

objective: Run first capped practice under new terms.
opposition: Habit and anxiety tempt overwork.
turn: Session stops on time despite unfinished drills.
consequence_cost: A new discipline model appears but remains fragile.

objective: Keep the agreed rest day intact.
opposition: Ravi has secretly booked a sparring partner.
turn: Anika realizes the contract is being tested immediately.
consequence_cost: Trust drops before dialogue even starts.

objective: Refuse coercive training demand.
opposition: Ravi invokes Maya to compel obedience.
turn: Anika says no and does not debate further.
consequence_cost: Boundary holds; household rupture becomes unavoidable.

objective: Secure safe place for the night.
opposition: Fear of escalating conflict and guilt pressure her to return.
turn: Priya receives Anika without interrogating her choices.
consequence_cost: Separation becomes public fact with relational cost.

objective: Conduct mediated family meeting.
opposition: Years of avoidance push both toward defensiveness.
turn: Priya enforces turn-taking until admissions become specific.
consequence_cost: Grief and control are named instead of displaced.

objective: Set enforceable terms for living and training.
opposition: Ravi resists external oversight clauses.
turn: All parties sign a written agreement with clear triggers.
consequence_cost: Authority is redistributed and documented.

objective: Execute regional quarterfinal plan.
opposition: Cora varies tempo to expose Anika's reduced load tolerance.
turn: Anika adjusts tactics but cannot dictate pace.
consequence_cost: Match becomes test of adaptation, not domination.

objective: Win deciding game despite fatigue.
opposition: Cora's pressure and crowd energy tighten margins.
turn: Anika loses in five games without physical collapse.
consequence_cost: Public loss without injury alters success metric.

objective: Absorb result with Ravi nearby.
opposition: Shame urges Anika toward old self-punishment script.
turn: Ravi offers analysis without command tone.
consequence_cost: Relationship holds under disappointment.

objective: Spend a normal Saturday together.
opposition: Both default to logistics when emotion nears.
turn: Cooking Maya's lemon rice creates shared, non-strategic focus.
consequence_cost: Domestic tenderness re-enters the house.

objective: Discuss future without using tournament language.
opposition: Fear of blame and old hierarchy stalls conversation.
turn: Ravi admits he used training to outrun grief.
consequence_cost: Mutual honesty restores limited trust.

objective: Advance through invitational semifinal.
opposition: High-level opponent forces long rallies and precision.
turn: Anika takes early lead through controlled aggression.
consequence_cost: Elite pathway appears attainable again.

objective: Decide whether to continue after pain flare.
opposition: Sponsor stakes and debt anxiety push toward denial.
turn: Medical timeout confirms recurrence risk; Anika withdraws.
consequence_cost: Immediate financial opportunity is lost by choice.

objective: Manage fallout with sponsor and family watching.
opposition: Sponsor rep pressures Ravi to frame withdrawal as tactical.
turn: Ravi publicly backs Anika's health-first decision.
consequence_cost: Power dynamic permanently shifts toward Anika's agency.

objective: Test new routine at community junior clinic.
opposition: Anika feels withdrawal from old overtraining intensity.
turn: She redirects urge into coaching drills for younger players.
consequence_cost: Identity expands beyond self-punitive competition.

objective: Close season on sustainable terms.
opposition: Debt and uncertainty tempt return to extremity.
turn: Anika ends practice at planned limit and keeps Maya's watch on schedule, not as punishment.
consequence_cost: Grief becomes integrated practice rather than self-harm engine.
